options.name: -ccw
options.description: where to place new IO instance, default is in counterclocksise direction of reference instance.

options.name: -cell
options.description: cell name list for new IO instances

options.name: -inSelected
options.description: to repeatedly insert new IO instances in selected cells

options.name: -inst
options.description: instance name prefix for new IO, must match the number of cells

options.name: -ioRing
options.description: add new IO instance on IO ring 'num'

options.name: -ioRow
options.description: row name on which new IO instance is added

options.name: -orientation
options.description: Orientation: R0 R90 R180 R270 MX90 MY90 MX MY

options.name: -refInst
options.description: reference instance for new IO instance

options.name: -repeat
options.description: repeatedly adding IO instances for every 'num' cells

options.name: -selected
options.description: selected instances as references where new inst is added.

options.name: -side
options.description: specify which side to add new IO

options.name: -skip
options.description: skip 'num' of cell to add first IO inst, effective when -repeat is specified

options.name: -spacing
options.description: distance of new IO instance from referenced inst.

options.name: -spread
options.description: when specified, all IO cells on the row where new IO is added will be evenly replaced.
